title: a11y-index
description: Schema for accessibility/dist/a11y-index.json — the flat slug→WCAG index derived from accessibility/src/ by scripts/accessibility/derive-a11y-index.js. Consumed by the plugin's category-defaults-loader.js to resolve a11y_refs slugs to WCAG criteria, and by the future MCP server. Carries both an ordered `sections` array and a `bySlug` map of the same entries for O(1) lookup.

_schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Bumps require coordinated deriver + consumer updates.

examples.do_not_edit: Edit the per-section src/ files; CI regenerates this file.

sections.description: One entry per accessibility section, in source order.

bySlug.description: The same section entries keyed by slug, for O(1) lookup by consumers (e.g. the plugin resolving a11y_refs). Mirrors `sections`.

section.description: A single accessibility section's index entry.

slug.description: Stable section slug — the cross-consumer anchor that a11y_refs resolve against. Never derived from editable prose.

title.description: Human-readable section title (may carry a leading source number).

tier.description: Section tier classification (e.g. header vs substantive foundation/component sections).

wcag.description: WCAG 2.x success-criterion numbers this section maps to. Empty for header sections.

body_excerpt.description: Short plain-text excerpt of the section body, for previews/search.
examples: The four WCAG principles — Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust …
